heading: Art. 55. Cruel and unusual punishments prohibited
label: 855 Art. 55. Cruel and unusual punishments prohibited
text: Punishment by flogging, or by branding, marking, or tattooing on the body, or any other cruel or unusual punishment, may not be adjudged by any court-martial or inflicted upon any person subject to this chapter. The use of irons, single or double, except for the purpose of safe custody, is prohibited.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)85550:636.(Art. 55), .May 5, 1950, ch. 169, § 164 Stat. 126The word “may” is substituted for the word “shall”.
